title: Food Packages And Recycling
description: its a mod were you can put food in packages easy for roleplaying a grocery store
body:
Food Packages and Recycling enhances Minecraft’s food system by introducing innovative packaging and recycling mechanics, all using vanilla items! This mod offers an immersive and sustainable way to manage food storage, waste, and recycling, without the need for new weapons or non-vanilla content.

Features:
✅ Packaged Food – Store and stack food in craftable packages, keeping your inventory organized and efficient.
📦 Cardboard Boxes and Plastic packages – Use cardboard boxes and Plastic packages for easy transport and storage, making it simple to move large amounts of food between locations.
♻ Recycling System – Break down used food packaging into reusable materials, reducing waste and encouraging sustainability.
🛠 Crafting Integration – All recipes are crafted from vanilla Minecraft items, ensuring seamless compatibility with your world.
🍎 Balanced Gameplay – No overpowered mechanics—just a realistic and fun way to manage your food resources.

Perfect for players who love survival, resource management, and adding a touch of realism to their Minecraft worlds. The handy plastic packages are perfect for quick food transport, while the cardboard boxes help you organize and store your food for easy access. Start packaging and recycling today to reduce waste, keep your inventory tidy, and create a more sustainable world! 🌿

(The only non-vanilla items are Petroleum and Petroleum Ore and bauxite)
